signatureMove.name: Threats & Promises
signatureMove.endStepEffect: The enemy character gains 3 energy and may not target this model with an action for the remainder of the turn. This effect takes place even if the enemy is outside this character's Melee Range.

abilities.name: Concealed Dagger
abilities.description: If this character deals Piercing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1. If this character plays a Rising Attack increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

abilities.name: Network of Spies
abilities.description: Gain +1 to your initiative roll each turn.

abilities.name: Strength from Suffering
abilities.description: Whenever another character suffers Wds from a Catastrophe effect, this character restores that many Wds.

abilities.name: Foreboding
abilities.description: When an enemy targets this character with an action, the active enemy model must suffer 1 Wd or the action is cancelled. If the active enemy model is slain by this, the action is also cancelled.

arcaneOutcomes.text: Target other character suffers X Wds. Then, for each Wd lost, a friendly model within 8" and LoS of this model restores 1 Wd and gains 1 energy. The same friendly model may be chosen multiple times.
